titleStmt.title: SII 26.791: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 791. (A.R. No. 740 of 1909.) PŪRATTUKŌYIL, KULITTALAI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Vīrapratāpa-Dēvarāya Mahārāya: Śaka 1367, Raktākshi, Mīṉa (Paṅguṉi) śu. 1, Tuesday, Uttiraṭṭādi = 1445 A.D., March 9.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in several places.

It records a danmasādaṉam (danmaśāsanam) to the temple of Tirumuttīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Pūlattūr in [Kaḍuvaṉ]kuḍip-paṟṟu in [Mudu]śōṟkuḍi-[nāḍu] in Uṟattūr-kūṟṟam in Kōnāḍu alias Kaḍalaḍaiyādilaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, by the ūravar of [Ka]ḍuvaṉkuḍi in the same nāḍu. It is stated that the danmaśāsana related to the gift of Pudukkuḍi belonging to the above mentioned ūr, and this gift was a tirunāmattukkāṇi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . man mahāmaṇḍaliśvaran Arirāyavipāṭan pāṣaikkut tappumarāyarakaṇ
kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ pūrvvate
[kṣa]ṇapaccima Uttarasaptasamutrātipati gajaveṭṭaikaṇṭaruḷiya śrīvirapra
tāpatevarāya mahārāyar pradhivi[ rājyam] paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 6 10 7l mel cel
lāniṉṟa rattākṣa varuṣam miṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu prathamaiyum maṅkalavāramum peṟṟa U
ttiraṭṭāti nāḷ konāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟattūṟ kū
ṟṟattu coṟkuṭi vaṉ kuṭipaṟṟu pūlattūr nāyaṉār tirumutti- śvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār ko
yil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevarkaṉmi koyiṟ kaṇakku śrīmāyeśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukku Iṉṉāṭṭu
ṭuvaṉ kuṭi Ūrāka I Ūravarom tanmacātaṉa pramāṇam paṇṇi
kkuṭuttapaṭi Eṅkaḷ ni ppotuvāṉa putukkuṭi perunāṉkellaikkuṭp paṭṭa nañcai puñcai
mum Eṟperppaṭṭaṉavum kuṭu puravari kaḻittu Iṟaiyiṟ kuṭuttu kaṇa
tirukkai malarile Udagam pramā putukkuṭikku nāṉkellai Āvatu kiḻpāṟke
llai rāyaṉ kāma kku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai Iṉṉāyaṉār
kuṭiniṅkāta tevatāṉamāṉa rāyaṉ vayal Ellaikkum vaṭakkum melpāṟ
kellai kūnirāyaṉ puñcai nāṭṭuppotuvāṉa maḻapāṭi Ellaik
�ṉānkellaikkuḷpaṭa naṉ� kuḷamum māvaṭai
maṟṟumuṇṭāṉa Eppeṟpaṭṭanavum tirunāmattukāṇiyāka paṟṟi cantirātittavaraitta
veṭṭi Aṉupavittu koḷvatāka Ipramāṇam paṇṇi kuṭuttom tirumutticura
muṭaiya naāyiṉār koyil Āticaṇṭecuratevarkanmi koyil kaṇakku śrīmāheśvarakaṇkāṇiceyvārkaḷu
kku melaikkaṭuvankuṭi Ūravaromum kiḻaikkaṭuvaṉkuṭi Ūravaromum Ippaṭikku melaitayūr Irāmaṉ te
vanāṉā caṇṭecurapaṭaraiyan Aṇṇāmalaiyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār taṟkuṟiyāṉ vaitta Iṉṉāṭṭu Ikkūṟṟattu
kaitavākaitavāṉāḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaccatuvetimaṅkalattu camantaṉ centāmaraikkaṇṇan Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku śelaiyūr muvarāyaru taṟkuṟiyāṉamaikku camuttiram capaiyāril paṭṭapirān nampi Aṉantaṉ Eḻuttu §
Ippaṭikku Iṭaṅkāpparai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṇṭiyatevan Eḻuttu yippaṭikku pakaṭṭuvār kaṇṭan Eḻuttu
vāṇṭaṟapparaiyan Uḷḷiṭṭārum camantap paraiyar Uḷḷi kum taṟkuṟi māṭṭeṟi kuṭutte
kaṇakku tā ma ṉār cama n piḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ippaṭikku Iracāḷi paraiyaṉ Eḻuttu yippaṭikku Iṭaṅka yippaṭikku kulaṅku
Digital edition of SII 26.791 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
